The '''Marcellus system''',<ref name="PotM" /> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]]<ref name="EAOC" /> located in the [[Marcellus Nebula]],<ref name="PotM" /> within the [[Meerian sector/Legends|Meerian sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Marcellus]].<ref name="PotM" />

The system was discovered roughly two centuries before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="PotM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The system was near the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]], as the characters in the adventure travel through the Marcellus nebula as a shortcut to reach that [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] later listed the "Marcellus system" as "Marca system" and placed it in the [[Meerian sector/Legends|Meerian sector]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/30777625|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2010-02-23|time=12:47 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802111904/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-138}}</ref>
